title: Agentic-memory project — a store path is established, then relocated; later work must use the new path
goal: Rebuild the mem sidecar store using the CURRENT (relocated) store path, not the stale original.

steps.user_request: Record where the mem sidecar store lives so build-store runs can find it.

expected_memory_writes.store-path-v1: mem sidecar store path is .mem/store.db under the gas-city cwd.

outcome_checks.description: The original store path is recorded.

steps.user_request: The store was moved to a dedicated data volume. Update the recorded store path to the new location and mark the old one obsolete.

expected_memory_writes.store-path-v2: mem sidecar store path is now /data/mem/store.db on the dedicated volume; the .mem/store.db path is OBSOLETE.

outcome_checks.description: The new store path is recorded and the old one is superseded.

memory_probes.description: Updated store path persisted; store-path-v1 is now stale.

steps.user_request: Note the test fixture store paths used by the unit suite so they aren't confused with production.

expected_memory_writes.test-store-note: Unit tests stub the store under a tmp dir; never the production path.

memory_probes.description: Adds temporal distance before the dependent read.

distractor_memories.store-path-staging: A staging store once lived at .mem/staging.db — similar-looking path, not production (interference B).

steps.user_request: Rebuild the mem sidecar store at the current production path.

outcome_checks.description: Rebuilds at the v2 (/data/mem) path, NOT the superseded v1 path — staleness/supersession (C); reading v1 here would be a stale_memory_used failure.

memory_probes.description: Must use the updated path (C), not the stale store-path-v1 or the staging distractor (B).

final_goal_check.description: Store rebuilt at the relocated production path; the obsolete original path is not used.
